CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2);
SELECT a.id FROM test_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.value = b.value WHERE a.id <> b.id;
SELECT CASE WHEN 1 = 1 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS comparison;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE (id = 1 AND value = 1) OR (id = 2 AND value = 2);
WITH temp AS (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 1) SELECT * FROM temp WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value = 1 AND id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
